# Quality Dashboard Template

Use this template when writing `quality-audit.md`.

---

```markdown
# Quality Audit Dashboard: {Scope Name}

**Analysis Date**: {YYYY-MM-DD}  
**Scope**: {epic / sprint / milestone / JQL}  
**Completion**: {N}/{M} stories closed ({X}%)  
**Generated by**: Quality Auditor

---

## ⚠️ Active Alerts

> _Only include this section if thresholds are breached_

- 🔴 **CRITICAL**: {N} open critical bug(s): {KEY-1}, {KEY-2}
- ⚠️ **WARNING**: Defect density {X.XX} exceeds threshold 0.50
- ℹ️ **INFO**: Test pass rate {X}% below target 98%

---

## Executive Health Summary

**Overall Quality**: ✅ Excellent / 🟢 Good / 🟡 Acceptable / 🟠 Poor / 🔴 Critical

{2–3 sentence narrative: what the numbers show, key risk or strength, priority action.}

---

## Metrics Dashboard

| Metric | Value | Target | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Defect density (per story) | X.XX | < 0.30 | ✅ / 🟡 / 🔴 |
| Defect density (weighted) | X.XX | < 3.0 | |
| Open critical bugs | N | 0 | |
| Open high bugs | N | < 2 | |
| Story coverage | X% | > 95% | |
| Test execution | X% | > 90% | |
| Test pass rate | X% | > 98% | |
| Automation ratio | X% | > 70% | |
| Stories untested | N | 0 | |
| Avg cycle time | X days | benchmark | |
| Biggest bottleneck | {stage} ({X}%) | < 30% | |
| Blocked issues | N | 0 | |
| MTTR (bugs) | X days | < 3 days | |

---

## Defect Analysis

### Distribution

| Priority | Total | Open | Closed |
|---|---|---|---|
| Critical | N | N | N |
| High | N | N | N |
| Medium | N | N | N |
| Low | N | N | N |
| **Total** | **N** | **N** | **N** |

**Defect density**: {X.XX} per story | {X.XX} per story point  
**Weighted density**: {X.XX}  
**Trend**: {↑ Worsening +X% / ↓ Improving -X% / → Stable} vs. prior period

### Open Critical / High Bugs

| Key | Summary | Priority | Status | Age |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| KEY-1 | {Summary} | Critical | In Progress | X days |

---

## Test Coverage

**Story coverage**: {N}/{M} stories have test cases ({X}%)  
**Execution**: {N}/{M} tests executed ({X}%)  
**Pass rate**: {N}/{M} tests passed ({X}%)  
**Automation**: {N}/{M} tests automated ({X}%)

### Untested Stories

| Key | Summary | Priority | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| KEY-1 | {Summary} | P2 | In Progress |

### Failed Tests

| Key | Summary | Failure Reason |
|---|---|---|
| TEST-1 | {Summary} | {Reason or "Not specified"} |

---

## Bottleneck Analysis

| Stage | Avg Time | % of Cycle | Severity |
|---|---|---|---|
| To Do → In Progress | X days | X% | ✅ / 🟡 / 🟠 / 🔴 |
| In Progress → Review | X days | X% | |
| Review → Testing | X days | X% | |
| Testing → Done | X days | X% | |
| **Total** | **X days** | **100%** | |

**Blocked issues**: {N} currently blocked  
**MTTR**: {X} days avg (target: Critical < 1d, High < 3d, Medium < 7d)

---

## Recommendations

1. **{Priority}**: {Specific, data-backed recommendation citing actual numbers}
2. **{Priority}**: {Recommendation}
3. **{Priority}**: {Recommendation}

---

_Generated by quality-auditor on {date}_
```
